name: io.github.forgesworn/402-mcp
description: L402 + x402 client MCP server — AI agents discover, pay for, and consume any payment-gated API autonomously. Supports Lightning (NWC), Cashu ecash, and human-in-the-loop payments. Works with any L402-compliant server: toll-booth, Aperture, or any conforming implementation.

environmentVariables.name: NWC_URI
environmentVariables.description: Nostr Wallet Connect URI for fully autonomous Lightning payments (e.g. nostr+walletconnect://...). Optional — omit to use human-in-the-loop QR payments.

environmentVariables.name: CASHU_TOKENS
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a Cashu ecash token store file. Optional.

environmentVariables.name: MAX_AUTO_PAY_SATS
environmentVariables.description: Safety cap for a single autonomous payment in satoshis. Default: 1000.

environmentVariables.name: MAX_SPEND_PER_MINUTE_SATS
environmentVariables.description: Rolling 60-second spend cap across all payments in satoshis. Default: 10000.
